tech_news.title: Human Brain Cells Run New Data Centers in Singapore, Melbourne - Bloomberg.com
tech_news.description: Biotech startup Cortical Labs is working on two small data centers run by human brain cells, putting lab-grown neurons onto silicon in an experiment that could one day challenge chips from the likes of Nvidia Corp.
